title: V.E.C.T.O.R
fullTitle: Velocity-Enhanced Clustering for Transactional Outlier Recognition
abstract: A patented real-time fraud detection engine that personalizes anomaly detection to each user's behavior profile using dynamic behavioral clustering, persona-specific anomaly models, and multi-layer streaming architecture with sub-100ms scoring latency.
claims: Real-time transaction scoring with <100ms latency using streaming pipeline
Dynamic behavioral clustering using UMAP + HDBSCAN for user persona assignment
Per-cluster Isolation Forest models with persona-specific fraud baselines
Hybrid model architecture: XGBoost fallback for cold-start users
Suspicion buffer mechanism for trust-vs-suspicion history tracking
Continuous adaptation engine with profile updates per verified transaction
